description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test CUDA that runs on a schedule and can be triggered manually. The workflow checks out a repository, sets up Python 3.11 and MPI, and runs tests on CUDA using Python, TensorFlow, and PyTorch in a NVIDIA container. The workflow has two jobs: test_cuda and pass. The test_cuda job runs on an NVIDIA container and performs various tests, while the pass job depends on test_cuda and checks if all needed jobs succeeded.
